title: NexDesk Agent-to-Agent Communication Protocol (A2A)
description: Standardized JSON envelope for how autonomous AI agents within the NexDesk ecosystem negotiate, delegate, and resolve complex IT problems without human intervention.

intent_verb.description: The explicit action being requested of the receiving agent.

deadline_ms.description: Absolute epoch timeout for the receiving agent to respond.

target_capability.description: ...or broadcasted to any agent matching this skill.

context_window.description: The compressed state of the universe (logs, error spikes) leading to this message.

proposed_action_plan.description: Step-by-step mitigation plan proposed by the sender. Receiver must VOTE or EXECUTE.

blast_radius_estimate.description: Which downstream CMDB assets will break if the proposed action is taken.

lattice_signature.description: Post-quantum digital signature proving message authenticity.

blockchain_audit_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash anchoring this dialogue into the immutable ITIL ledger (Phase 59).
